paper_focus.title: Effects of Cryogenic Rolling on the Microstructure Evolution and Mechanical Properties of Low-Density Fe-28Mn-8Al-1C Steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To comprehensively examine the effect of cryogenic rolling on the microstructure evolution and mechanical properties of low-density Fe-28Mn-8Al-1C steel, addressing its low yield strength and providing experimental evidence for achieving excellent comprehensive mechanical properties.
main_process_variables: cryogenic rolling with cumulative thickness reductions of 30%, 50%, 70%, 90%
solution treatment at 1000°C for 1 h followed by water quenching
liquid nitrogen immersion for 3–5 min before each pass
tensile testing for strength and elongation
